Download an SPR workbook, caching it on disk

Source: R/cache.R
spr_cached_workbook.Rd

Returns a local path to the SPR Excel database for end_year / level, downloading it from NJ DOE on first use and reusing the cached copy thereafter. The download is validated as a real .xlsx (see is_valid_xlsx) before it is cached or returned, so an HTTP error or bot-protection page is never silently treated as data.

Usage

spr_cached_workbook(end_year, level)

Arguments

end_year

SPR school year end (2017-2025).

level

One of "school" or "district".

Value

Path to a local, validated .xlsx file.

Details

Disk caching is on by default. Disable it with options(njschooldata.workbook_cache = FALSE) or by turning off the session cache (njsd_cache_enable(FALSE)); in either case the workbook is downloaded to a temporary file each call.
